sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n639" key="a)glaoergo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγλαο-εργός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔργον</etym>) <sense id="n639.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ennobled by works</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">68</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
